paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

paragraph: Eliminate paper clutter in your workstation with these hanging file boxes. The transparent design makes the location of stored files easy, while the rectangle construction supports both horizontal and vertical document placement. A hinged lid snaps on tightly, and built-in rails are compatible with a range of hanging folders. These plastic Staples hanging file boxes lets you stack files and has built-in handles for convenient carrying.
bullets: Hanging file box is an easy way to store files
Compatible with letter- or legal-sized files; built-in rails allow for use with hanging file folders
Comes in clear and made of durable plastic
headliner: Store letter- and legal-sized documents with these clear Staples hanging file boxes.
expandedDescr: With the Staples letter and legal file box, you can take your files with you and know they'll stay safe and dry, even on the wettest, rainiest days. Unlike cardboard file boxes, this file box won't get soft or mushy when it gets damp, so even if you need to store your files in the basement, you'll know your important papers will remain safe. The lid on the Staples letter and legal file box snaps tightly shut to seal out moisture, dust, and other contaminants that could damage important files. It keeps your files safe and secure while also making them portable, so you'll always have your files with you when you need them. The Staples letter and legal file box holds both letter and legal file folders. Simply turn the files in the appropriate direction to fit them by the length or width of the box. The Staples letter and legal file box is made from clear polypropylene, so it's durable enough to stand up to rough handling and other conditions that would destroy a cardboard box. It's also clear, so if you have more than one box, you can easily see what's inside without having to open them.

bullets: Ideal for minor cuts, abrasions and puncture wounds
Fabric is designed to stretch and conform to the wounded area
Ventilated to aid in the natural healing process
headliner: Our fabric bandages are ideal for minor cuts, abrasions and puncture wounds.
expandedDescr: The flexible fabric is designed to stretch when you stretch while the strong adhesive still holds the bandage firmly in place. The pliable woven fabric also easily conforms to the wounded area and stays put even when wet. Each bandage is also ventilated to aid in the natural healing process. These are the bandages you will always want to have on hand whether that be in your home, office, or car.

paragraph: Bring fashion and functionality with the 4-tier simple sleek storage shelf that blends in wherever it is placed, whether in the garage or in the closet.  The IRIS USA shelving unit is made with durable resin and can withhold up to 100lbs per shelf with a total weight capacity of 400lbs.  With plenty of space on each shelf, the storage shelf is perfect for storing items whether light or heavy.  The storage shelf can be assembled easily by simply interconnecting the shelves and connecting bars together without any tools.
bullets: 100 lbs. per shelf / 400 lbs. entire unit
headliner: Whether in the garage, or in the home, use the convenient shelving unit to store storage boxes, gardening tools, clothes, books, or use as a plant shelf.

paragraph: Staples 5-inch kids scissors have pointed tips for precise, clean cuts, while the shorter blades are easy to control. The ambidextrous design is ideal for sharing, so everyone can use. Alphabet to Art class, Staples gives you the solution you need.
bullets: Perfect for left or right handed use
Stainless Steel finish allows for added durability
Assorted handle colors including Yellow and Green
headliner: Each of these Staples 5-inch kids scissors features an ambidextrous design, so everyone in the class can share supplies.
